name: AA_SATIS_223_ONR
definition:
CREATE   VIEW [dbo].[AA_SATIS_223_ONR] AS

SELECT 
YEAR(F.DATE_) YIL
,MONTH(F.DATE_) AY
,F.DATE_ TARIH
,F.FICHENO FATURA_NO
,C.CODE CARI_KODU
,C.DEFINITION_ CARI_ADI
,C.COUNTRY
,S.CODE STOK_KODU
,S.NAME STOK_ADI
,CASE WHEN F.TRCODE IN (2,3,6) THEN L.AMOUNT*-1 ELSE L.AMOUNT END MIKTAR
---,L.AMOUNT MIKTAR


---,L.PRICE FIYAT
--,CASE F.TRCODE WHEN 3 THEN L.PRICE*-1 ELSE L.PRICE END FIYAT

--,CASE F.TRCODE WHEN 3 THEN CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (7,9) THEN L.TOTAL-L.VATAMNT ELSE L.TOTAL END *-1
--ELSE CASE WHEN L.TRCODE=7 THEN L.TOTAL-L.VATAMNT ELSE L.TOTAL END END TUTAR


--,CASE WHEN ISNULL(D_EXC.RATES1,0) = 0 THEN (CASE F.TRCODE WHEN 3 THEN L.PRICE*-1 ELSE L.PRICE END) ELSE ((CASE F.TRCODE WHEN 3 THEN L.PRICE*-1 ELSE L.PRICE END) / D_EXC.RATES1) END  FIYAT_USD

--,CASE WHEN ISNULL(D_EXC.RATES1,0) = 0 THEN  
--(CASE F.TRCODE WHEN 3 THEN CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (7,9) THEN L.TOTAL-L.VATAMNT ELSE L.TOTAL END *-1THEN CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (7,9)
--ELSE CASE WHEN L.TRCODE=7 THEN L.TOTAL-L.VATAMNT ELSE L.TOTAL END END)
--ELSE 
--((CASE F.TRCODE WHEN 3 THEN CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (7,9) THEN L.TOTAL-L.VATAMNT ELSE L.TOTAL END *-1
--ELSE CASE WHEN L.TRCODE=7 THEN L.TOTAL-L.VATAMNT ELSE L.TOTAL END END) / D_EXC.RATES1)
--END TUTAR_USD


,CASE WHEN F.TRCODE IN (2,3,6) THEN (L.PRICE) *-1 ELSE (L.PRICE) END FIYAT

,CASE L.DISTCOST WHEN 0 THEN (CASE WHEN F.TRCODE IN (2,3,6) THEN L.VATAMNT*-1 ELSE L.VATAMNT END) ELSE 0 END KDV
--,L.PRICE FIYAT

--,CASE WHEN L.TRCODE=7 THEN L.TOTAL-L.VATAMNT ELSE L.TOTAL END TUTARESKI
----
,CASE WHEN F.TRCODE IN (2,3,6) THEN CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (7,9) THEN (L.TOTAL-L.VATAMNT) - (L.DISTCOST) ELSE (L.TOTAL) - (L.DISTCOST) END *-1


ELSE CASE WHEN L.TRCODE=7 THEN (L.TOTAL-L.VATAMNT) - (L.DISTCOST) ELSE (L.TOTAL) - (L.DISTCOST) END END TUTAR

,D_EXC.RATES1 USD_KUR
,CASE WHEN ISNULL(D_EXC.RATES1,0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ((CASE WHEN F.TRCODE IN (2,3,6) THEN L.PRICE*-1 ELSE L.PRICE END) / D_EXC.RATES1) END FIYAT_USD

,CASE WHEN ISNULL(D_EXC.RATES1,0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ((CASE L.DISTCOST WHEN 0 THEN (CASE WHEN F.TRCODE IN (2,3,6) THEN L.VATAMNT*-1 ELSE L.VATAMNT END) ELSE 0 END) / D_EXC.RATES1) END KDV_USD

,CASE WHEN ISNULL(D_EXC.RATES1,0) = 0 THEN 0
ELSE 
((
CASE WHEN F.TRCODE IN (2,3,6) THEN CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (7,9) THEN (L.TOTAL-L.VATAMNT) - (L.DISTCOST) ELSE (L.TOTAL) - (L.DISTCOST) END *-1


ELSE CASE WHEN L.TRCODE=7 THEN (L.TOTAL-L.VATAMNT) - (L.DISTCOST) ELSE (L.TOTAL) - (L.DISTCOST) END END)

/ D_EXC.RATES1)
END TUTAR_USD

,D_EXC_EUR.RATES1 EUR_KUR
,CASE WHEN ISNULL(D_EXC_EUR.RATES1,0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ((CASE WHEN F.TRCODE IN (2,3,6) THEN L.PRICE*-1 ELSE L.PRICE END) / D_EXC_EUR.RATES1) END  FIYAT_EUR

,CASE WHEN ISNULL(D_EXC_EUR.RATES1,0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ((CASE L.DISTCOST WHEN 0 THEN (CASE WHEN F.TRCODE IN (2,3,6) THEN L.VATAMNT*-1 ELSE L.VATAMNT END) ELSE 0 END) / D_EXC_EUR.RATES1) END KDV_EUR


,CASE WHEN ISNULL(D_EXC_EUR.RATES1,0) = 0 THEN 0
ELSE 
((
CASE WHEN F.TRCODE IN (2,3,6) THEN CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (7,9) THEN (L.TOTAL-L.VATAMNT) - (L.DISTCOST) ELSE (L.TOTAL) - (L.DISTCOST) END *-1


ELSE CASE WHEN L.TRCODE=7 THEN (L.TOTAL-L.VATAMNT) - (L.DISTCOST) ELSE (L.TOTAL) - (L.DISTCOST) END END)

/ D_EXC_EUR.RATES1)
END TUTAR_EUR

,ISNULL ((SELECT S.DISCPER FROM LG_223_01_STLINE S WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE LINETYPE=2 AND INVOICEREF=F.LOGICALREF AND S.DISCPER>0 AND S.PARENTLNREF=L.LOGICALREF),0) 'S INDIRIM ORANI'
,ISNULL ((SELECT S.DISCPER FROM LG_223_01_STLINE S WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE LINETYPE=2 AND INVOICEREF=F.LOGICALREF AND S.DISCPER>0 AND S.PARENTLNREF=0),0) 'G INDIRIM ORANI'
,ISNULL((
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN INVOICELNNO <= 1 THEN 0
            ELSE S.TOTAL / (INVOICELNNO - 1)
        END
    FROM LG_223_01_STLINE S 
    WHERE LINETYPE=3 AND INVOICEREF=F.LOGICALREF AND S.DISCPER>0
), 0) AS 'MASRAF TUTARI'

--,CASE WHEN L.TRCODE=7 THEN L.TOTAL-L.VATAMNT ELSE L.TOTAL END TUTAR
--,CASE SUBSTRING(S.CODE,1,2) 
--WHEN 'G0' THEN 'GLADIATOR KABIN' 
--WHEN 'G1' THEN 'GLADIATOR KABIN' 
--WHEN 'R0' THEN 'RONIN KABINR'
--WHEN 'RX' THEN 'RONIN XL'
--WHEN 'FO' THEN 'RONIN KABINR'
--WHEN 'F0' THEN 'FRERDOM'
--WHEN 'T0' THEN 'TROY'
--WHEN 'MC' THEN 'MOHICAN'
--WHEN 'RV' THEN 'REVIVA'
--WHEN 'GL' THEN 'GLADIATOR XL'
--WHEN 'GL' THEN 'GLADIATOR XL'
--WHEN 'PA' THEN 'PAN ANATOLIA' 
--WHEN '20' THEN 'AKSESUAR' 
--END TUR
--ONUR DENEME
--,CASE WHEN S.STGRPCODE='ETİCARET' THEN 'ETİCARET'
--ELSE
--(SELECT DEFINITION_ FROM LG_223_SPECODES WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE SPECODETYPE=25 AND SPECODE=L.SPECODE)
--END TUR
,(SELECT DEFINITION_ FROM LG_223_SPECODES WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE SPECODETYPE=25 AND SPECODE=L.SPECODE) TUR
,CASE WHEN L.TRCODE=2 THEN 'IADE'
WHEN L.TRCODE=3 THEN 'IADE' 
		WHEN L.TRCODE=14 THEN 'FİYAT FARKI'
		WHEN L.TRCODE=6 THEN 'SATINALMA IADE' ELSE 'SATIS' END FIS_TURU
,(SELECT CODE FROM LG_223_PROJECT WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE LOGICALREF=L.PROJECTREF) IS_EMRI_N0
,(SELECT NAME FROM LG_223_PROJECT WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE LOGICALREF=L.PROJECTREF) IS_EMRI_ADI
,l.SPECODE2
---,f.trcode
----
  ,(SELECT        FICHENO
                               FROM            LG_223_01_EMFICHE WITH (NOLOCK)
                               WHERE        LOGICALREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_223_01_INVOICE WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)) [MUH FİŞ NO],

----------------------------------------------
							  
							  
						  --ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

        --                       FROM            LG_223_01_EMFLINE
        --                       WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
        --                                                     (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
        --                                                       FROM            LG_223_01_INVOICE
        --                                                       WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '6%'),'') [MUHASEBE FİŞİ MUHASEBE KODU],

															   	  
						  --ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

        --                       FROM            LG_223_01_EMFLINE
        --                       WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
        --                                                     (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
        --                                                       FROM            LG_223_01_INVOICE
        --                                                       WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '15%'),'') [MUHASEBE FİŞİ MUHASEBE KODU____],

------------------------------
CASE WHEN 
	  ------
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_223_01_EMFLINE WITH (NOLOCK)
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_223_01_INVOICE WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '6%'),'') LIKE '6%' THEN
															   	  
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_223_01_EMFLINE WITH (NOLOCK)
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_223_01_INVOICE WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '6%'),'')

--------------------------------------------------------------264----

WHEN 
	  ------
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_223_01_EMFLINE WITH (NOLOCK)
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_223_01_INVOICE WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '26%'),'') LIKE '26%' THEN
															   	  
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_223_01_EMFLINE WITH (NOLOCK)
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_223_01_INVOICE WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '26%'),'')
-----------------------------------------------------730
WHEN 
	  ------
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_223_01_EMFLINE WITH (NOLOCK)
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_223_01_INVOICE WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '73%'),'') LIKE '73%' THEN
															   	  
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_223_01_EMFLINE WITH (NOLOCK)
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_223_01_INVOICE WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '73%'),'')




------------------------------------------------------750

WHEN 
	  ------
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_223_01_EMFLINE WITH (NOLOCK)
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_223_01_INVOICE WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '75%'),'') LIKE '75%' THEN
															   	  
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_223_01_EMFLINE WITH (NOLOCK)
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_223_01_INVOICE WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '75%'),'')



---------------------------------------------------770

WHEN 
	  ------
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_223_01_EMFLINE WITH (NOLOCK)
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN 
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_223_01_INVOICE WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '77%'),'') LIKE '77%' THEN
															   	  
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_223_01_EMFLINE WITH (NOLOCK)
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN 
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_223_01_INVOICE WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '77%'),'')






------------------------------760
WHEN 
	  ------
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_223_01_EMFLINE WITH (NOLOCK)
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_223_01_INVOICE WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '76%'),'') LIKE '76%' THEN
															   	  
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_223_01_EMFLINE WITH (NOLOCK)
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_223_01_INVOICE WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '76%'),'')


-------------------------------------
	----------------------------														   ---------------------------------------
															   ELSE 
 ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_223_01_EMFLINE WITH (NOLOCK)
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_223_01_INVOICE WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '15%'),'') END AS [MUHASEBE FİŞİ MUHASEBE KODU],
															   CASE F.TRCURR WHEN 0 THEN 'TL' WHEN 160 THEN 'TL' WHEN 1 THEN 'USD' WHEN 17 THEN 'GBP' WHEN 20 THEN 'EUR' ELSE 'Diğer' END AS ISLEM_DOVIZI




---------------------------------------------


															 --  SUBSTRING(EMU.CODE, 1, 15) [Fatura muhasebe Kodu]
					


---

FROM LG_223_01_STLINE AS L WITH (NOLOCK)
INNER JOIN LG_223_ITEMS AS S WITH (NOLOCK) ON S.LOGICALREF=L.STOCKREF
INNER JOIN LG_223_01_INVOICE AS F WITH (NOLOCK) ON F.LOGICALREF=L.INVOICEREF
INNER JOIN LG_223_CLCARD AS C WITH (NOLOCK) ON C.LOGICALREF=F.CLIENTREF
LEFT JOIN LG_223_EMUHACC EMU WITH (NOLOCK) ON EMU.LOGICALREF = L.ACCOUNTREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_EXCHANGE_223 D_EXC WITH (NOLOCK) ON D_EXC.CRTYPE = 1  AND D_EXC.EDATE = L.DATE_
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_EXCHANGE_223 D_EXC_EUR WITH (NOLOCK) ON D_EXC_EUR.CRTYPE = 20  AND D_EXC_EUR.EDATE = L.DATE_

WHERE LINETYPE=0 AND F.TRCODE IN (2,8,9,7,3,6,14)----8,9,7,
AND F.CANCELLED=0
AND YEAR(F.DATE_)>2021
--AND F.FICHENO='RAR2024000000499'

UNION ALL

SELECT 
YEAR(F.DATE_) YIL
,MONTH(F.DATE_) AY
,F.DATE_ TARIH
,F.FICHENO FATURA_NO
,C.CODE CARI_KODU
,C.DEFINITION_ CARI_ADI
,C.COUNTRY
,S.CODE STOK_KODU
,S.DEFINITION_ STOK_ADI
,CASE WHEN F.TRCODE IN (2,3,6) THEN L.AMOUNT*-1 ELSE L.AMOUNT END MIKTAR
--,L.AMOUNT MIKTAR
,CASE WHEN F.TRCODE IN (2,3,6) THEN (L.PRICE) *-1 ELSE (L.PRICE) END FIYAT
--,L.PRICE FIYAT
,CASE L.DISTCOST WHEN 0 THEN (CASE WHEN F.TRCODE IN (2,3,6) THEN L.VATAMNT*-1 ELSE L.VATAMNT END) ELSE 0 END KDV

--,CASE WHEN L.TRCODE=7 THEN L.TOTAL-L.VATAMNT ELSE L.TOTAL END TUTARESKI
----
,CASE WHEN F.TRCODE IN (2,3,6) THEN CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (7,9) THEN (L.TOTAL-L.VATAMNT) - (L.DISTCOST) ELSE (L.TOTAL) - (L.DISTCOST) END *-1


ELSE CASE WHEN L.TRCODE=7 THEN (L.TOTAL-L.VATAMNT) - (L.DISTCOST) ELSE (L.TOTAL) - (L.DISTCOST) END END TUTAR


,D_EXC.RATES1 USD_KUR

,CASE WHEN ISNULL(D_EXC.RATES1,0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ((CASE WHEN F.TRCODE IN (2,3,6) THEN L.PRICE*-1 ELSE L.PRICE END) / D_EXC.RATES1) END  FIYAT_USD



,CASE WHEN ISNULL(D_EXC.RATES1,0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ((CASE L.DISTCOST WHEN 0 THEN (CASE WHEN F.TRCODE IN (2,3,6) THEN L.VATAMNT*-1 ELSE L.VATAMNT END) ELSE 0 END) / D_EXC.RATES1) END KDV_EUR

,CASE WHEN ISNULL(D_EXC.RATES1,0) = 0 THEN 0
ELSE 
((
CASE WHEN F.TRCODE IN (2,3,6) THEN CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (7,9) THEN (L.TOTAL-L.VATAMNT) - (L.DISTCOST) ELSE (L.TOTAL) - (L.DISTCOST) END *-1


ELSE CASE WHEN L.TRCODE=7 THEN (L.TOTAL-L.VATAMNT) - (L.DISTCOST) ELSE (L.TOTAL) - (L.DISTCOST) END END)

/ D_EXC.RATES1)
END TUTAR_USD


,D_EXC_EUR.RATES1 EUR_KUR
,CASE WHEN ISNULL(D_EXC_EUR.RATES1,0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ((CASE WHEN F.TRCODE IN (2,3,6) THEN L.PRICE*-1 ELSE L.PRICE END) / D_EXC_EUR.RATES1) END  FIYAT_EUR


,CASE WHEN ISNULL(D_EXC_EUR.RATES1,0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ((CASE L.DISTCOST WHEN 0 THEN (CASE WHEN F.TRCODE IN (2,3,6) THEN L.VATAMNT*-1 ELSE L.VATAMNT END) ELSE 0 END) / D_EXC_EUR.RATES1) END KDV_EUR

,CASE WHEN ISNULL(D_EXC_EUR.RATES1,0) = 0 THEN 0
ELSE 
((
CASE WHEN F.TRCODE IN (2,3,6) THEN CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (7,9) THEN (L.TOTAL-L.VATAMNT) - (L.DISTCOST) ELSE (L.TOTAL) - (L.DISTCOST) END *-1


ELSE CASE WHEN L.TRCODE=7 THEN (L.TOTAL-L.VATAMNT) - (L.DISTCOST) ELSE (L.TOTAL) - (L.DISTCOST) END END)

/ D_EXC_EUR.RATES1)
END TUTAR_EUR

,ISNULL ((SELECT S.DISCPER FROM LG_223_01_STLINE S WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE LINETYPE=2 AND INVOICEREF=F.LOGICALREF AND S.DISCPER>0 AND S.PARENTLNREF=L.LOGICALREF),0) 'S INDIRIM ORANI'
,ISNULL ((SELECT S.DISCPER FROM LG_223_01_STLINE S WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE LINETYPE=2 AND INVOICEREF=F.LOGICALREF AND S.DISCPER>0 AND S.PARENTLNREF=0),0) 'G INDIRIM ORANI'
,ISNULL((
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN INVOICELNNO <= 1 THEN 0
            ELSE S.TOTAL / (INVOICELNNO - 1)
        END
    FROM LG_223_01_STLINE S 
    WHERE LINETYPE=3 AND INVOICEREF=F.LOGICALREF AND S.DISCPER>0
), 0) AS 'MASRAF TUTARI'

-----
,(SELECT DEFINITION_ FROM LG_223_SPECODES WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE SPECODETYPE=25 AND SPECODE=L.SPECODE) AS TUR
,CASE WHEN L.TRCODE=2 THEN 'IADE'
WHEN L.TRCODE=3 THEN 'IADE' 
		WHEN L.TRCODE=14 THEN 'FİYAT FARKI'
		WHEN L.TRCODE=6 THEN 'SATINALMA IADE' ELSE 'SATIS' END FIS_TURU
,(SELECT CODE FROM LG_223_PROJECT WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE LOGICALREF=L.PROJECTREF) IS_EMRI_N0
,(SELECT NAME FROM LG_223_PROJECT WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE LOGICALREF=L.PROJECTREF) IS_EMRI_ADI
,l.SPECODE2
--,f.trcode

----
  ,(SELECT        FICHENO
                               FROM            LG_223_01_EMFICHE WITH (NOLOCK)
                               WHERE        LOGICALREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_223_01_INVOICE WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)) [MUH FİŞ NO],

----------------------------------------------
							  --ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

         --                      FROM            LG_223_01_EMFLINE
         --                      WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
         --                                                    (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
         --                                                      FROM            LG_223_01_INVOICE
         --                                                      WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '6%'),'') [MUHASEBE FİŞİ MUHASEBE KODU],

		CASE WHEN 
	  ------
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_223_01_EMFLINE WITH (NOLOCK)
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_223_01_INVOICE WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '6%'),'') LIKE '6%' THEN
															   	  
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_223_01_EMFLINE WITH (NOLOCK)
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_223_01_INVOICE WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '6%'),'')

--------------------------------------------------------------264----

WHEN 
	  ------
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_223_01_EMFLINE WITH (NOLOCK)
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_223_01_INVOICE WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '26%'),'') LIKE '26%' THEN
															   	  
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_223_01_EMFLINE WITH (NOLOCK)
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_223_01_INVOICE  WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '26%'),'')
-----------------------------------------------------730
WHEN 
	  ------
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_223_01_EMFLINE WITH (NOLOCK)
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_223_01_INVOICE WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '73%'),'') LIKE '73%' THEN
															   	  
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_223_01_EMFLINE WITH (NOLOCK)
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_223_01_INVOICE WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '73%'),'')









------------------------------------------------------750

WHEN 
	  ------
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_223_01_EMFLINE WITH (NOLOCK)
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_223_01_INVOICE WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '75%'),'') LIKE '75%' THEN
															   	  
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_223_01_EMFLINE WITH (NOLOCK)
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_223_01_INVOICE WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '75%'),'')







---------------------------------------------------770

WHEN 
	  ------
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_223_01_EMFLINE WITH (NOLOCK)
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_223_01_INVOICE WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '77%'),'') LIKE '77%' THEN
															   	  
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_223_01_EMFLINE WITH (NOLOCK)
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_223_01_INVOICE WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '77%'),'')

------------------------------760
WHEN 
	  ------
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_223_01_EMFLINE WITH (NOLOCK)
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_223_01_INVOICE WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '76%'),'') LIKE '76%' THEN
															   	  
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_223_01_EMFLINE WITH (NOLOCK)
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_223_01_INVOICE WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '76%'),'')




------------------------------
	----------------------------														   ---------------------------------------
															   ELSE 
 ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_223_01_EMFLINE WITH (NOLOCK)
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_223_01_INVOICE WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '15%'),'') END AS [MUHASEBE FİŞİ MUHASEBE KODU],
															   CASE F.TRCURR WHEN 0 THEN 'TL' WHEN 160 THEN 'TL' WHEN 1 THEN 'USD' WHEN 17 THEN 'GBP' WHEN 20 THEN 'EUR' ELSE 'Diğer' END AS ISLEM_DOVIZI

															  --- SUBSTRING(EMU.CODE, 1, 15) [Fatura muhasebe Kodu]
					
FROM LG_223_01_STLINE AS L WITH (NOLOCK)
INNER JOIN LG_223_SRVCARD AS S WITH (NOLOCK) ON S.LOGICALREF=L.STOCKREF
INNER JOIN LG_223_01_INVOICE AS F WITH (NOLOCK) ON F.LOGICALREF=L.INVOICEREF
INNER JOIN LG_223_CLCARD AS C WITH (NOLOCK) ON C.LOGICALREF=F.CLIENTREF
LEFT JOIN LG_223_EMUHACC EMU WITH (NOLOCK) ON EMU.LOGICALREF = L.ACCOUNTREF

LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_EXCHANGE_223 D_EXC WITH (NOLOCK) ON D_EXC.CRTYPE = 1  AND D_EXC.EDATE = L.DATE_
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_EXCHANGE_223 D_EXC_EUR WITH (NOLOCK) ON D_EXC_EUR.CRTYPE = 20  AND D_EXC_EUR.EDATE = L.DATE_

WHERE LINETYPE=4 AND F.TRCODE IN (2,9,8,7,3,6,14)--9,8,7,
AND F.CANCELLED=0
AND YEAR(F.DATE_)>2021

UNION ALL

SELECT 
YEAR(F.DATE_) YIL
,MONTH(F.DATE_) AY
,F.DATE_ TARIH
,F.FICHENO FATURA_NO
,C.CODE CARI_KODU
,C.DEFINITION_ CARI_ADI
,C.COUNTRY
,S.CODE STOK_KODU
,S.DEFINITION_ STOK_ADI
,L.AMOUNT MIKTAR
,(L.PRICE) FIYAT
,0 KDV
,(L.PRICE) TUTAR


,D_EXC.RATES1 USD_KUR
,CASE WHEN ISNULL(D_EXC.RATES1,0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ((L.PRICE) / D_EXC.RATES1) END FIYAT_USD
, 0 KDV_USD
,CASE WHEN ISNULL(D_EXC.RATES1,0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ((L.PRICE) / D_EXC.RATES1) END TUTAR_USD



,D_EXC_EUR.RATES1 EUR_KUR
,CASE WHEN ISNULL(D_EXC_EUR.RATES1,0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ((L.PRICE) / D_EXC_EUR.RATES1) END FIYAT_EUR
,0 KDV_EUR
,CASE WHEN ISNULL(D_EXC_EUR.RATES1,0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ((L.PRICE) / D_EXC_EUR.RATES1) END TUTAR_EUR



,'' 'S INDIRIM ORANI'
,'' 'G INDIRIM ORANI'
,'' 'MASRAF TUTARI'
,S.DEFINITION2 TUR
,'TLP' FIS_TURU
,(SELECT CODE FROM LG_223_PROJECT WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE LOGICALREF=L.PROJECTREF) IS_EMRI_N0
,(SELECT NAME FROM LG_223_PROJECT WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE LOGICALREF=L.PROJECTREF) IS_EMRI_ADI
,l.SPECODE

 ,'' [MUH FİŞ NO],

''[MUHASEBE FİŞİ MUHASEBE KODU],
CASE L.PRCURR WHEN 0 THEN 'TL' WHEN 160 THEN 'TL' WHEN 1 THEN 'USD' WHEN 17 THEN 'GBP' WHEN 20 THEN 'EUR' ELSE 'Diğer' END AS ISLEM_DOVIZI
															--   '' [Fatura muhasebe Kodu]

FROM LG_223_01_DEMANDLINE AS L WITH (NOLOCK)
INNER JOIN LG_223_SRVCARD AS S  WITH (NOLOCK) ON S.LOGICALREF=L.ITEMREF
INNER JOIN LG_223_CLCARD AS C  WITH (NOLOCK) ON C.LOGICALREF=L.CLIENTREF
INNER JOIN LG_223_01_DEMANDFICHE AS F WITH (NOLOCK) ON F.LOGICALREF=L.DEMANDFICHEREF

LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_EXCHANGE_223 D_EXC WITH (NOLOCK) ON D_EXC.CRTYPE = 1  AND D_EXC.EDATE = F.DATE_
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_EXCHANGE_223 D_EXC_EUR WITH (NOLOCK) ON D_EXC_EUR.CRTYPE = 20  AND D_EXC_EUR.EDATE = F.DATE_
WHERE S.CODE LIKE'X 6%'
AND YEAR(F.DATE_)>2021
